SEO_TITLE: Premios ESLAND 2024 - Celebrando lo mejor del streaming y los creadores de contenido
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Descubre a los mejores creadores de contenido de España, Latinoamérica y Andorra. ¡Vota por tus favoritos! Celebra la innovación y el talento de Twitch, YouTube y más
HEADER_SUB_TITLE: +3 years of experience in web development. I'm passionate about creating and developing web applications.
LAST_WORKS_SUB_TITLE: These are some of the projects I've worked on recently

PROJECTS.title: Identidad UABC
PROJECTS.description: Mobile application development for UABC identity management. Developed using Flutter as a freelance project for e-sol.

PROJECTS.title: Start Market App
PROJECTS.description: Mobile application development for sales management in a grocery store. Developed with Flutter as a freelance project for e-sol.

PROJECTS.title: Presta
PROJECTS.description: Development and deployment of a web app portal for laboratory equipment loan control at UABC. Built with Vue.js and Express.js, and deployed on university servers.

PROJECTS.title: DigiTabWeb
PROJECTS.description: Development and deployment of a web portal for managing publications at the UABC Engineering Institute. Developed with Vue.js and Express.js, and deployed on university servers.

PROJECTS.title: Academic Indicators System
PROJECTS.description: Development, maintenance, and deployment of an academic indicator system for the UABC Engineering Institute. Developed with Vue.js and Express.js, and deployed on university servers.

EXPERIENCE.description: Involved in the development and maintenance of web and mobile applications. Utilizing solutions with .NET, .NET Core, C#, SQL Server, AWS, Vue.js, and more. Implementation of RESTful services. Worked under Scrum methodology. Integrated PDF generation systems.

Participated in software development using both monolithic and microservices architectures. Delivered RESTful API developments for over 100,000 users. Configured server resource optimization. Used Scrum methodology.

Participated in the development and production launch of an autonomous drone monitoring system. Worked on an Android mobile app and a web system built with ASP.NET Core. Performed application deployments and staff training.
Creation of high-performance reports based on company metrics. Responsible for identifying improvements in reporting and proposing ideas for new data visualizations.
